mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recycle_order ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM recycle_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM recycle_order ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recycle_order (order_number, user_id, total_count, total_points, recycle_address, contact_phone, order_status, remark) VALUES (#{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{totalCount}, #{totalPoints}, #{recycleAddress}, #{contactPhone}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark})
